content.full_text:
TO: ( ) J. LARSON   ( ) R. BROWN
    ( ) G. BAUGHER  ( ) A. HERNDON
    ( ) B. LEIDIGH   (x) J. PRITCHARD
    ( ) K. DONOVAN   ( ) M. KVASAGER
    ( ) J. MCLEAN    ( ) C. WARDLOW
    ( ) L. MONTGOMERY ( ) H. ARRIOLA
    ( ) J. GREENWOOD

FROM: Kvasager, M.A.
DATE: March 30, 1988

[x] TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW
[ ] CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
(IF YOU HAVE ANY COMMENTS, NOTIFY ADVISOR WITHIN 1 DAY)

FILE LOCATION: 84211, 84305, 84305

INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE: YES [ ] NO [ ]

CALLER: Mimi
REPRESENTING: Senator Gary Hart
PHONE NUMBER: 447-0163

QUESTION: The Senator is holding a fundraiser for Art Agnos who is running for S.F. mayor. The Senator will be accepting checks contributed to the fundraiser. All checks will be made out to Agnos and turned over to the Agnos campaign. The Senator will not be depositing any of the checks he receives. OK?

ANSWER: Yes. In addition, Agnos will need to be identified as the sender of any mass mailings sent by the Senator in connection with this fundraiser. I told her to contact the City/County Registrar's office to determine if the Senator's non-monetary contributions to Agnos violate SF local ordinance. FPPC does not interpret local ordinanc
